idea.title: Move Coordination Life-Event Coordinator
idea.description: Extend move coordination (closing -> movers -> utilities -> address updates) to all life events (weddings, new baby, career change). Checklists + vendor network + automation.

idea.title: Open House Guest Tracking Event Guest Management
idea.description: Generalize open house guest tracking (QR check-in, follow-up emails, feedback) to all personal events (parties, weddings, receptions). RSVP management + gift registry.

idea.title: Email Triage
idea.description: Inbox intelligence: priority routing, auto-drafting responses, action extraction. Solves "lost in email" pain for agents.

idea.title: Closing Day Orchestration
idea.description: Real-time coordination + checklist execution for closing day (docs + signatures + wire transfers + keys + final walkthrough). Extends Dossie Sign + DocuSeal into realtime operations.

idea.title: Jarvis SaaS
idea.description: Standalone subscription with vault + wallet. White-glove first-deal setup + concierge $149. Builds on Dossie personal assistant foundation.

idea.title: SOI Relationship Memory
idea.description: Track agent relationships + key moments (birthdays, anniversaries, kids, pets, recent transactions). Auto-prompt on calendar events or CRM refresh.

idea.title: Pre-funded wallet for agent purchases
idea.description: Agent funding account for vendor/subscription purchases. Bridges agent brokerage + Dossie commerce. Part of Jarvis SaaS.

idea.title: Travel rebook capability
idea.description: Train/flight/hotel agent. Proven by SNCF pain (2026-06-24). Cord-cutting for multi-leg itineraries.

idea.title: Cold email to TX agents
idea.description: Full Apollo + Instantly stack. Proven playbook. Acceleration of founding member acquisition.

idea.title: Founder ambassador program
idea.description: Founding members as referral network. $50/referral, white-glove onboarding.

idea.title: Concierge white-glove first-deal setup
idea.description: First-deal onboarding + Dossie configuration + transaction template setup. Premium tier. Bridges solo to scale.

idea.title: Bitwarden-backed password vault
idea.description: Bitwarden integration for agent + client password + document management. Part of Jarvis SaaS. White-label capable.

idea.title: Mileage + Expense Brain
idea.description: Automatic mileage tracker (iOS Health + passthrough expense logging). Weekly/monthly summaries for tax deduction.

idea.title: Vendor Find Me a Pro
idea.description: On-demand recommendations for contractors, inspectors, lenders, title cos. Weighted by agent network + peer reviews.

idea.title: Closing Gifts to Personal Gifts
idea.description: Automated gift suggestions + ordering for client closings. Extends to personal milestones (birthdays, new baby). White-glove vendor integration.

idea.title: Home Maintenance Household OS
idea.description: Turns post-closing maintenance checklist + vendor list into proactive household task mgmt. Seasonal reminders, HVAC filters, roof inspections, pest control.

idea.title: Showing Scheduler General Appointment Booker
idea.description: Generalize showing scheduling (clients + team) to all personal/professional appointments. Tie to Jarvis voice for same interface.

Keys needed:
